## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## TDD Checklist

- [ ] Every new function/method has a test written before its implementation
- [ ] Watched each test fail before implementing (for the right reason)
- [ ] Wrote minimal code to pass each test
- [ ] All tests pass: `make test`
- [ ] No race conditions: `make test-race`
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 85%: `make coverage`
- [ ] `make check` passes (fmt + vet + lint + test)
